titleStmt.title: SII 9.6: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 6. (A.R. No. 327 of 1912.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD AT KARSHANAPALLE, SAME ZAMINDARI AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is not dated and refers itself to the reign of the Bāṇa king Bāṇarasa, who was also in charge of the Gaṅga six-thousand province when Ballaha i.e., the Rāshṭrakūṭa king led a campaign against Kāḍuveṭṭi, for not paying tribute. On this occasion a certain servant of Bānataṭṭaran, himself a servant of Vijayitta, while returning on a horse near Kuntiāla, died after slaying Gaṇamūrti. Since the characters of the record are of the 9th century A.D. it may be assigned to the time of Vijayāditya II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakalajagatrayābhivandita
sūrāsūrādhīśaparamēśvarapratihā
rīkṛtamahāvalikulōtbhavaśrīmahā
valibāṇarasar prithuvīrājyaṁgeye
ballaha kāḍuvaṭṭiya kappagoḍadeḻta
ndandu gaṁgaṟusāsiramumān bāṇarasar
prithuvīrājyaṁgeya vijayittanāḷu bā
ṇataṭṭaran tanna Aḷu Ugepōgi maṟu
bappoṁge kuṁtiĀladali kudure Ē
ṟi barutire gaṇamurtti Eccoḍe Iṟidu bāḷ
kiḻtu Idire naḍadu kaṟvittavōgi taḻtu satta .
Digital edition of SII 9.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
